title: Massive RPG
description: A fantasy RPG modpack featuring skill progression, magical abilities, custom weapons, powerful enemies, and immersive exploration. Designed to transform Minecraft into a rich role-playing adventure.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2d32a4fe777718d8796dcac3e408041d429d2d1.png)

Massive RPG is a modpack with a RPG-style experience in Minecraft. It includes Terralith for enhanced world generation, various RPG-themed mods for progression and exploration, and a few performance-improving mods to keep the game running smoothly. It aims to offer a more immersive adventure without becoming overly complex.
